## [00:00 - 00:45]

The now or never close. John, this offer I'm making you is for right now, this moment in time. It's a now or never offer, as I will never be able to make this available. And I won't be able to do it tonight, tomorrow. I can't even do it two hours from now. Because of the incentives we have available to us right now to hit our targets, I am not able.
